gold.title: Interactive Hover Button
gold.reason: Highest downloads (3927) and likes (52) in the category. Polished hover animation with sliding fill and arrow reveal — universally applicable as a primary CTA on any SaaS, business, or portfolio site. Zero dependencies beyond lucide-react.

gold.title: Glow Effect
gold.reason: Most downloaded (4585) and liked (64) component in the whole category. A flexible animated glow wrapper with 6 modes (rotate, pulse, breathe, colorShift, flowHorizontal, static) — acts as a powerful visual accent for buttons or hero sections on any modern site.

gold.title: CTA with Glow
gold.reason: Production-ready full CTA section block with shadcn design, badge, heading, button, and an animated radial glow that activates on hover. Clean structure, well-integrated with brand tokens, ideal for SaaS bottom-of-page CTAs.

gold.title: CTA with Rectangle
gold.reason: Complete CTA section block with staggered entrance animations, optional badge, title, description, glow effect, and smooth fade-in-up transitions. Covers the full pattern used in modern SaaS landing pages — drop-in ready.

gold.title: Shimmer Button
gold.reason: High downloads (2707) and strong visual polish. A fully self-contained button with a conic-gradient shimmer animation traveling the perimeter — works dark/light, highly customizable via CSS variables. Standard marquee CTA button for SaaS hero sections.

gold.title: Call to action
gold.reason: Complete, production-ready CTA section with badge, headline, description, and dual CTAs (outline + primary) inside a rounded muted card. Clean shadcn/tailwind pattern, broadly applicable to any landing page.

gold.title: Ethereal Beams Hero
gold.reason: Full hero section with 3D animated light beams (Three.js/r3f), glassmorphic pill nav, badge, headline, subtitle, dual CTA buttons, and stat counters. Visually impressive, production-quality — ideal for SaaS and tech startup hero sections.

gold.title: Cta 4
gold.reason: Well-structured two-column CTA section with headline, description, primary button on the left and a feature checklist on the right — a classic high-converting layout used on SaaS and product sites.

gold.title: Call to Action
gold.reason: Visually rich full CTA block with gradient background, overlapping avatar social proof, gradient headline, and rounded pill CTA button. Strong conversion-focused design that works for community, SaaS, and startup sites.

gold.title: Button Colorful with Hover Effect
gold.reason: High downloads (1749). Elegant button with an indigo-to-pink gradient blur that fades in on hover — modern, dark/light compatible, and extremely versatile as a primary CTA button on any site.

gold.title: Pulse Beams
gold.reason: Distinctive animated SVG beam layout as seen on Next.js website. Highly configurable with customizable beam paths, gradient colors, and connection points — creates a striking hero backdrop. Strong brand recognition and production polish.

gold.title: Modern Background Paths
gold.reason: Full hero section with 4 rotating animated SVG background patterns (neural, flow, geometric, spiral), animated per-letter title, and gradient-bordered CTA button. Complete, visually impressive, and highly differentiated.

silver.title: Hover Button
silver.reason: Good downloads (1043) and likes (17). Sophisticated pointer-move-tracked glowing circle effect — visually distinct and well-coded, but requires a specific dark glassmorphic context to shine. Not universally applicable.

silver.title: Action Search Bar
silver.reason: Good downloads (849) and likes (29). Polished Raycast-inspired animated command/search bar — high quality but situational, best suited for SaaS app dashboards or AI product landing pages.

silver.title: Magnetize Button
silver.reason: Good downloads (864) and likes (22). Engaging particle-attraction animation on hover — violet-themed, well-structured, but the 'Hover me' label hardcodes demo text and it's more of a novelty button than a universal CTA.

silver.title: Typewriter Effect
silver.reason: Good downloads (1112) and likes (21). Classic typewriter animation for hero headlines — useful text accent component, but it's a text primitive rather than a full CTA section.

silver.title: Hand Writing Text
silver.reason: Good downloads (1097) and likes (14). Animated SVG hand-drawn circle around a title with fade-in text — elegant and memorable, but niche (best for creative/portfolio sites) and limited to specific styling contexts.

silver.title: Modal Pricing
silver.reason: Useful upgrade flow pattern — button triggers a modal with radio-group plan selection. Well-coded with shadcn dialog, radio group, and feature lists. Situational but valuable for SaaS upgrade CTAs.

silver.title: Floating Action Menu
silver.reason: Good downloads (558) and likes (13). Polished floating action button with animated spring-reveal menu options — useful for app-like interfaces but too app-specific for pure marketing landing pages.

silver.title: Shiny Button
silver.reason: Good downloads (847). Framer-motion driven shine sweep animation looping across the button — elegant and dark/light aware, but similar to shimmer-button. A solid secondary option for CTA buttons.

silver.title: About Us section
silver.reason: Full-featured About Us section with 3-column service grid, parallax background, animated center image, stat counters, and inline CTA. Impressive scope but branded for interior design/architecture firms, limiting adaptability.

silver.title: Feature 1
silver.reason: Clean two-column feature block with headline, description, dual buttons and image — useful but basic layout without any visual polish or animation. Good foundation but generic.

silver.title: v0 AI Chat
silver.reason: High downloads (3581). Clone of Vercel v0 chat input UI with quick-action chips — very recognizable and polished, but extremely specific to AI product landing pages. Strong for that niche.

silver.title: Magnetic Button
silver.reason: Good downloads (567) and likes (7). Clean magnetic hover wrapper that attracts button toward cursor — subtle and production-ready, but it's a behavioral wrapper rather than a styled CTA, requiring composition with other elements.

silver.title: CTA 3
silver.reason: Clever design with corner plus-icon decorators, dashed center divider, and gradient background — distinctive layout for minimal CTA sections. Slightly too minimal to stand alone on most sites.

silver.title: Diced Hero Section
silver.reason: Full hero with 2-column layout, animated text entrance, and a 2x2 image grid with CSS mask clipping effects. Highly customizable and visually distinct, but depends on external image assets and a custom chronicle-button dependency.

silver.title: Get Started Button
silver.reason: Good downloads (668). Clever button with a sliding chevron panel on hover — clean and production-ready, but it's a single-use micro-interaction rather than a complete CTA component.

silver.title: Button Shiny
silver.reason: Good downloads (639). Deep purple gradient button with layered glassmorphic inner borders — visually striking but locked to a dark purple color scheme, limiting applicability to sites with that palette.

silver.title: Calendar
silver.reason: Bento card with calendar UI and 'Book Now' CTA — niche but useful for portfolio/agency sites with booking flows. Has a hardcoded external cal.com link and rough code quality (random highlighted days).

silver.title: Hover Velocity Hero
silver.reason: Interactive background with parallax-reactive floating shapes and particles on hover — good visual quality and well-coded, but it's a background container without any CTA content baked in.

bronze.title: Animated Underline Text
bronze.reason: Animated SVG wavy underline on hover for a heading — too minimal (heading primitive only, no CTA structure). Niche decoration effect for specific design styles.

bronze.title: CTA Card
bronze.reason: Very low downloads (50) and zero likes. Has hardcoded 'Sigma Nuts' branding text left in the code. Basic card structure without meaningful polish or uniqueness.

bronze.title: Call to Action
bronze.reason: Extremely low downloads (11) and zero likes. Plain text + two links with lorem ipsum content — essentially a skeleton with no visual design or polish.

bronze.title: X Gradient Card
bronze.reason: Social proof embed styled as a tweet card with glassmorphic layers — too niche (Twitter/X post embed) to be a general CTA component. Hardcoded author avatars and content.

bronze.title: Particle Button
bronze.reason: Simple particle burst animation on click — a fun micro-interaction but not a standalone CTA component. Low likes (4) and the effect is minor.

bronze.title: Aurora Flow
bronze.reason: Three.js/r3f WebGL aurora shader background with non-Tailwind CSS classes — heavy dependencies (three, simplex-noise, react-three), very low downloads (106) and zero likes. Too exotic and heavyweight for typical website redesigns.

bronze.title: Ethereal
bronze.reason: WebGL hero with post-processing and scrolling effects — extremely low downloads (13) and zero likes. Heavy and complex setup that is overkill for most customer website redesigns.

bronze.title: VHS Hero Section
bronze.reason: Three.js distortion shader with glitch effects, VHS aesthetic, GSAP animations — extremely niche retro aesthetic, very low downloads (76) and zero likes. Only suitable for very specific creative/experimental sites.

bronze.title: Call to Action
bronze.reason: Bare minimum CTA — centered heading, single paragraph with placeholder lorem ipsum, two buttons. Zero polish, zero downloads (3), zero likes. No visual differentiation.

bronze.title: Interactive Empty State
bronze.reason: Animated empty state with three fanning icons — well-coded but fundamentally an empty state UI pattern for app dashboards, not a marketing CTA. Very low downloads (47) and zero likes.

bronze.title: Fey.com Button
bronze.reason: Very niche replica of Fey.com's specific trial button style with a hardcoded lock icon — too branded and specific to one product's design language. Low downloads (193) and low likes (3).

bronze.title: App Store Button
bronze.reason: Single-purpose Apple App Store download button — only useful for mobile app landing pages. Zero likes. A useful utility but too narrow in scope for general website redesign.

bronze.title: Play Store Button
bronze.reason: Single-purpose Google Play Store download button — same limitations as the App Store button. Only for mobile app sites. Very low downloads (106) and zero likes.

bronze.title: Text Disperse
bronze.reason: Playful hover effect that scatters letters in random directions — a visual toy with extremely low downloads (1) and zero likes. Too exotic and max 13-character limitation makes it impractical for real CTAs.
